_comment_: Example MCP server configuration. Copy to ~/.claude.json or use `claude mcp add`.

filesystem._note_: Read/write files in the project directory only — scope it tight.

github._note_: Read PRs, issues, file contents. Token from env — never inline.

sqlite-readonly._note_: Example of a read-only data source — scope MCP servers to least privilege.

fetch._note_: Fetch URLs the model needs to read. Combine with permissions.deny to limit hosts.
